bias.analyst: Nine minutes to the bell. The grind higher continues and the near-field sell interest has evaporated - buyers are stepping up into very thin supply just under the first resistance. Above it, mostly air until the big overhead wall, which notably GREW as price approached - someone is defending that zone. Floor below remains massive. Constructive tilt, but pre-open pushes into resistance are bait as often as breakout; the opening volume decides. No position until the first half hour classifies the day.
bias.commentator: Nine minutes to kickoff and Theo's side is already winning the warm-up! The defenders in front of the first line have simply walked off the pitch - barely anyone left to stop a run at it. But look deeper: the away team is REINFORCING their main bus, adding bodies as our strikers approach. The manager isn't fooled by warm-up goals: 'the match starts at the whistle, and the first half hour picks our game plan.'

events.analyst: Theo Live is now public. From here on, session events appear in this feed with a delay - wins, losses, and the days we sit on our hands.
events.commentator: Welcome to the grounds! The gates are open for the first time. Pre-season record is on the board - including the losses. We hide nothing here, folks.
